elaboration: Mind maps need to be a new methodology that sit beside the others. we should use the initial brainstorming prompt to guide into the most appropriate methodology.

perOptionNotes.gallery: we should suggest the best method based on the initial prompt.
perOptionNotes.concierge: this could be an option in the method gallery / funnel.
perOptionNotes.seed-inference: i don't think we want to do this one. we already have the sketch pad and we should assume whatever is drawn there is rough, if we received a sketch of a mind map we could suggest that method be used in the method gallery / funnel
perOptionNotes.canvas-first: this makes sense for when mind map is selected as the option in the method gallery / funnel
perOptionNotes.meta-board: i think this is the flow we want in general but needs to be combined with the others
